Spirit Salve  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints by 326. Max: 456

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 181 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 35 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your wounds heal.
Cast on other: Soandso 's wounds heal.

Game Description

Mends your target's wounds, healing between 326 and @1 hit points.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Spirit Salve

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Spirit Salve
ClassLevel
BST48
SHM40
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (17)
  • Sold By (9)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Now castable by PC
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2018 at 10:19 AM Rating: Excellent
Barudin314
590 posts
To dispell any confusion for the upcoming server:

July 13, 2016
_____________________
*** Spells ***

- Made many changes to smooth out and improve the availability of healing at low levels. These changes apply to all servers and rulesets.
- - Shaman - Added two new direct heals: Spirit Salve at level 40, and Kragg's Salve at level 50. These scrolls are now available on any Shaman vendor that sells Superior Healing.
▲ Page top
Now castable by PC
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2018 at 4:57 PM Rating: Excellent
Barudin314
590 posts
Barudin314 wrote:
To dispell any confusion for the upcoming server:

July 13, 2016
_____________________
*** Spells ***

- Made many changes to smooth out and improve the availability of healing at low levels. These changes apply to all servers and rulesets.
- - Shaman - Added two new direct heals: Spirit Salve at level 40, and Kragg's Salve at level 50. These scrolls are now available on any Shaman vendor that sells Superior Healing.


Confirmed you can buy this spell in classic from Halas - Telvina
Confimed - Cralk - Grobb

Edited, Mar 19th 2018 7:06pm by Barudin314

lvl req in game 40

Feracitus
8 posts
I currently have this spell on my lvl 39 shaman, when i try to mem it to spell book says need lvl 40.
▲ Page top
lvl req in game 40
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2016 at 2:31 AM Rating: Good
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
Feracitus wrote:
I currently have this spell on my lvl 39 shaman, when i try to mem it to spell book says need lvl 40.

This spell and another one are from the July update :
Quote:
Shaman - Added two new direct heals: Spirit Salve at level 40, and Kragg's Salve at level 50. These scrolls are now available on any Shaman vendor that sells Superior Healing.

Lucy says level 39 and 49 for those spells, when the scrolls actually require level 40 and 50. Looks like a small bug. The scrolls will be on Zam once the Item Collector works again.
▲ Page top

AA

# Nov 06 2006 at 7:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591872415299
14 posts
There is now an AA available to Drakkins starting at level 5, that increases in power every 5 levels. It is a neat little breath spell. You just have to do a small kill and loot task to increase it. Just goes to show, you never know that soe will do! ^_^

__DEL__1592257375552
View User Forum
26 posts
by looking at the raw spell data my guess is that it is an AA ability as by looking at the raw code for the spell its skill atrib is listed as innate. So dont quote me on this but it may be an existing AA named for the effect not the skill or it could be put in place for an upcoming ability or and ability that just never went life for one reason for another. Hope this helps. And like i said im just shootin from the hip on that guess so please dont quote me lol.
